nodes.label: Approval Gate Pattern (require_approval decorator)
nodes.rationale: Human-in-the-loop gate before destructive or costly external API calls (ad creation, posting, image generation). Prevents accidental spend by requiring explicit DB flag approval before proceeding.

nodes.label: Idempotency Pattern (campaign_key dedup)
nodes.rationale: create_ads checks existing campaign_key before creating Meta campaigns to prevent duplicate ad spend. Pattern repeated across pipeline stages.

nodes.label: Crash-Safe Pending Jobs Pattern
nodes.rationale: Video job IDs persisted to JSON before polling so long-running async jobs survive process crashes. resume_pending() allows recovery without resubmission.

nodes.label: Pipeline Status Machine (posts table)
nodes.rationale: Posts move through: draft → prompts_ready → creative_generating → creative_ready → approved → posted. Each command advances or blocks on this status field, making the pipeline auditable and resumable.
